span.p:
Decision-maker confirmed
alive in role this quarter?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
SPONSORSHIP HYPOTHESIS FIRST
map new org chart before any other play

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Last successful rostering sync
within 7 days AND row count stable?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
IMPLEMENTATION HYPOTHESIS
rostering pre-flight before any product or relationship play

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Partner has expressed frustration
with product capability or scope fit?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
PRODUCT FIT HYPOTHESIS
pull usage by feature area, map to success plan

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
External context: budget pressure,
competing tool, leadership change?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
EXTERNAL PRESSURE HYPOTHESIS
adjust renewal posture - not a product intervention

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
RUN ALL FOUR IN PARALLEL
no single hypothesis is dominant - run full diagnostic
